title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50's David Malan argues that AI still struggles to reliably edit documents like humans can, because the internal structure of word documents operates like software with its own logic rather than plain text. He contends that while computers can operate on thousands of documents simultaneously, each change must be trustworthy, which requires treating documents as software rather than simple files.
